chapter_title.en: Chapter 132 – The one whose evil is feared

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/282)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/282)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مَنْ خَافَ النَّاسُ لِسَانَهُ فَهُوَ فِي النَّارِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Muhammad Bin Isa Bin Ubeyd, from Yunus, from Abdullah Bin Sinan who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The one whom the people fear his tongue, so he would be in the Fire’.
en.sarwar: 3. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from ‘Ubayd from Yunus from ‘Abd Allah ibn Sinan who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Whoever is feared because of his foul language will be in the fire.’”
